about:
Sanjivani Sports Public School founded by Mr. Ram Charan Chaursiya. The School has been established by the Viklang Sewa Evam Technical Shiksha Sansthan. Sanjivani Sports Public School Semrahana, Mihinpurwa, Bahraich, (UP) Pin - 271855 now started in 2017 with the motto “Discipline, quality and value education. The main aim of the school is to make children educated under the discipline so that the children can easily get their goals in the future.

Sanjivani Sports public School rises above the confines of conventional teaching. With an activity based Curriculum, the institution initiates character development and the highly qualified faculty ensures academic excellence. Within a span of few years, Sanjivani Sports public School established a name for itself in academic achievements and is ranked the No. 1 SSPS of Semrahana, Mihinpurawa, Bahraich, (U.P.) Pin - 271855.

We follow a unique child centered philosophy of making the child comfortable at school and provide situations for them to learn naturally. Our focus on providing a loving environment that gives positive vibes to children who grow up to have a strong self esteem, High confidence, positive attitude and cheerful personalities.
vision: Sanjivani Sports Public School aims at nurturing individuals with paramount values and multivalent competencies. This lofty ideal is accomplished by virtue of a dynamic curriculum that envisions not only academic excellence but a wholesome all round development of the child, his character and personality, aesthetic refinements, effective skills, Sports and the art of living.
mission:
To enable the child to grow up as a disciplined, responsible and productive citizen of a democratic country.

To introduce well balanced integrated personalities to the future of tomorrow.

To foster high standards of behavior based on mutual responsibility and self discipline.

To ensure quality teaching and learning by providing an education that enriches and empowers.

To inculcate among students not just academics but also human excellence by nurturing values of generosity, truthfulness, compassion and tolerance and justice.

To assist each student to discover their strengths and talents and make them aspire for goals of excellence.

To inculcate and foster in students a strong social consciousness so that they may be effective leaders, team players and leaders of tomorrow.
founderMessage: Education is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change the world. At SSPS, we strive to empower our students with knowledge and values.
managerMessage: We are committed to providing the best infrastructure and facilities to ensure our students excel in every field.
principalMessage: Welcome to SSPS. Our focus is on the all-round development of every child, ensuring they reach their full potential.
managementCommittee: The School Management Committee is responsible for a holistic development of children and is obligated to support the School’s mission. The Committee commits itself to raising student achievement through reforms and restructuring measures. We have done much but we have a long way to go
